title: Attack on Titan
opinion: peak fiction until 139. the ending didn't ruin it but it definitely hurt. s1-s3p2 is untouchable
author: Hajime Isayama

nine_titans.Attack: Fights for freedom, sees future memories (Eren)
nine_titans.Jaw: Speed + crushing jaw (Marcel -> Ymir -> Porco -> Falco)

key_characters.Eren: Protagonist turned antagonist, Attack + Founding Titan, started the Rumbling
key_characters.Mikasa: Ackerman, loves Eren, kills him in the end
key_characters.Levi: Ackerman, humanity's strongest soldier, most popular character
key_characters.Erwin: Survey Corps commander, iconic charge, died choosing Armin over him
key_characters.Reiner: Armored Titan, warrior with PTSD, suffering incarnate
key_characters.Zeke: Beast Titan, Eren's half-brother, euthanasia plan

key_facts: Rumbling: Eren unleashes millions of Colossal Titans, destroys 80% of world
Paths: metaphysical realm connecting all Eldians
Ackermans: immune to titan powers, superhuman
'Only Ymir knows' became a meme for unexplained plot
Levi vs Beast Titan is top 5 anime moments
Declaration of War is peak cinema
Erwin's charge is the greatest anime scene
hot_takes: The ending didn't ruin it but Eren's character assassination was real
Reiner is the best written character in anime
MAPPA did their best but WIT era was superior visually
'Thank you for becoming a mass murderer' is unforgivable writing
